violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Convection ovens not located under hood.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware-washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store boxes of single service items off floor in storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under shelving units and equipment.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
